title: Italy China Alliance for Transaqua
description: Foreign Director for Bonifica S.p.A, Italy, Franco Persio Bocchetto's address to the Schiller Institute's conference, "Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind", in Bad Soden, Germany, November 25 & 26, 2017.
